verses.12: They have lied about the LORD and said:
verses.14: Therefore this is what the LORD God of Hosts says:
verses.18: “Yet even in those days,” declares the LORD, “I will not make a full end of you.
verses.19: And when the people ask, ‘For what offense has the LORD our God done all these things to us?’ You are to tell them, ‘Just as you have forsaken Me and served foreign gods in your land, so will you serve foreigners in a land that is not your own.’”
verses.20: Declare this in the house of Jacob and proclaim it in Judah:
